warnings.message: CONST.TOKEN_HEXAGONAL_SHAPES is deprecated in favor of CONST.TOKEN_SHAPES
warnings.note: CANNOT BE SUPPRESSED. Fires from a Proxy get trap inside foundry.mjs at ES module parse time (hexagonal-aura-geometry.mjs:15). foundry.mjs captures console.error by reference before any module script runs, so our console.error patch never intercepts it. The property is also non-configurable (configurable: false on a Proxy value), so the getter cannot be replaced. Fix requires the grid-aware-auras module to update to CONST.TOKEN_SHAPES.

warnings.message: You are accessing the global "CanvasLayer" which is now namespaced under foundry.canvas.layers.CanvasLayer
warnings.note: CANNOT BE SUPPRESSED. Fires from a non-configurable getter on globalThis inside foundry.mjs at ES module parse time (aura-layer.mjs:11). foundry.mjs captures console.error by reference before any module script runs, so our console.error patch never intercepts it. The getter is also marked configurable: false, so it cannot be replaced with Object.defineProperty. Fix requires the grid-aware-auras module to update to foundry.canvas.layers.CanvasLayer.
